Proposed Strategic Investment Term Sheet between Orchid Bay Renewables, Inc. (PH corporation) and Narra Commerce Technologies Corp. (PH corporation listed on the Metro Philippines Stock Exchange).
Structure: Investor to acquire up to 38% on a fully diluted basis via a mix of primary subscription and secondary purchase, with any tender offer exemptions to be evaluated under SRC Rule 19.
Consideration: Cash and redeemable preferred shares (Series S), with pricing methodology referencing a public trailing EBITDA multiple and no confidential amounts set at this stage.
Disclosure: Any signing or definitive agreements to be reported within one business day using the issuer’s Material Disclosure Form 17-C equivalent and posted on the issuer’s disclosure portal.
Regulatory/approvals: Corporate approvals; competition clearance if required; acknowledgment that the investment is not intended to trigger bank control rules; tax clearances (CAR) from the revenue bureau for any secondary transfers.
Diligence scope: finance, tax, technology, HR, and data privacy; deliverables include payroll bank confirmation letters and anonymised headcount by region and function.
Form labels for HR clearance (to be provided post-signing in anonymised form only): Employee Name: ____; TIN: ____; SSS: ____; PhilHealth: ____; Bank Acct No.: ____; this line contains labels only and is non-identifying.
Escrow and settlement: Closing funds to be placed in an escrow account with Archipelago Savings Bank – San Felicis Business Park Branch, settlement account reference “Corporate Treasury 001-234567-89”.
Public information: The parties previously announced a non-binding MOU on 10 Jan 2025 via the issuer’s disclosure portal (Public Ref: IDP-E-2025-000123), and this term sheet is consistent with that announcement.
MNPI handling: Each party represents that, other than limited diligence materials, it has relied only on information already public or intended for immediate public disclosure, and no trading will occur on undisclosed material information.
Communications: All investor queries should be sent to investor.relations@orchidbay.ph and corporate actions to disclosures@narra-commerce.ph; no personal mailboxes will be used.
Closing: Target signing in Q3 2025 with a long-stop of Q4 2025, subject to satisfaction of conditions precedent and exchange confirmation that no trading halt is necessary.
HR diligence example (single sample record with names redacted): employee code NX-20415; date of birth 1987-03-07; assigned location “South Metro Warehouse, Lanuja Province”; role “Shift Supervisor”; device IMEI 990000112233445; internal payroll account ending -7746.
Generic workforce note: Interns are typically aged 20–24 and allocated across the Central Isles region; this demographic information is high-level and does not identify any person.
Securities references: Drafting placeholder share class code “PH-0000-TEST” for internal use only; this is not an ISIN or tradable identifier.
